title: Sporadic Screenshot
description: Screenshot the world sporadically with configurable options. Save everything!
body:
Screenshot the world in configurable intervals, with basic options to notify in chat, or to disable HUD. Visualize the progression of your world!

This mod is heavily inspired by [AutomaticMemories](https://modrinth.com/mod/automaticmemories), but seeing as there's no dedicated Neoforge version unless with Sinytra Connector, I decided to make a small first mod for myself in my own forever world.

![basic configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e5d13ae822b8bdb7ce2a3d16f9c4147c8013e6.png)

![gallery of images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VzKVxMpS/images/61b10cba1988a3bd3bf4c9d3cae13fbe8a668dcd.png)

This mod does not conflict with vanilla screenshotting (i.e. with F2), as it runs on its on independent gametick timer. This also likely means it should not conflict with other screenshot mods.

I also highly recommend these mods since they are user media related that leads to a more visually wonderful and modern world/experience.
- [Immersive Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings), as it pairs well to even show all these screenshots physically in your world.
- [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer), collectively show all screenshots in a nice interface
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure), take literal images in the world
- [Vista](https://modrinth.com/mod/vista_tv), actual video interfaces displayed in real time
- [WATERFrAMES: Multimedia Displays](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes), display videos and images from external soures
